title: Contact Us
description: We’re here to help you with driving training, license assistance, instructor onboarding, partnerships, or any general inquiries related to Pilot Mobility.
intro: Whether you’re a learner, instructor, or business partner, feel free to reach out to us through the details below.

email.title: Email
email.description: For support, service-related queries, cancellations, refunds, or partnership inquiries.

customerSupport.title: Customer Support
points: Using in-app support (Pilot Learner / Pilot Instructor App)
Emailing us with your registered mobile number and booking details
customerSupport.note: Our team will respond within a reasonable timeframe.

connect.title: Connect With Us
connect.description: Stay updated with announcements, offers, and learning tips:

instructors.title: For Instructors
instructors.intro: If you are a certified driving instructor and wish to join Pilot:
points: Complete your profile and upload required documents
Our Operations Team (OBT) will verify and onboard you
instructors.note: For assistance, contact us via email.

legal.title: Legal & Compliance
body: For privacy-related requests, data deletion, or compliance queries, please email us with the subject line:
